description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default Docker image and runs a global before_script to update apt, install python and python-pip, and upgrade pip installing cfn-lint, ansible-lint, and yamllint. Define a single stage named test. Add a job called test in the test stage that executes the command find . -regextype posix-extended -regex '.*\\.y(a)?ml' -exec yamllint \"{}\" \\; to lint all YAML files. Then run ansible-lint . to lint Ansible playbooks, with no additional artifacts, caches, or triggers.
